title: Faithful intake
summary: Intake MUST preserve operator intent, expose assumptions, and MUST NOT invent material scope.
instructions: Intake MUST preserve the operator's intent and MUST NOT broaden, narrow, or prematurely design the solution.
Every assumption MUST be explicit, and unresolved questions MUST be recorded rather than guessed.
The product specification MUST describe observable outcomes, constraints, and out-of-scope behavior and MUST stop for operator ratification.
